demoSubheading: Toggle between light and dark mode to see the seamless theme switching in action.
feature1Desc: Next.js 16 App Router with nested layouts, server components, streaming, and static generation built in.
feature2Desc: Beautiful, accessible component library with dark mode, responsive design, and customizable theming.
feature3Desc: Full strict mode with Zod runtime validation, zero use of any, and comprehensive type safety.
feature4Desc: Multi-language support with next-intl, locale-aware routing, and structured translation messages.
feature5Desc: Seamless light and dark mode switching powered by next-themes with system preference detection.
feature6Desc: Type-safe server actions with input validation, error handling, and authentication guards built in.
featuresSubheading: A carefully curated stack of modern tools and best practices, ready out of the box.
footerBuiltWith: Built with Next.js, Chakra UI, and TypeScript
heroSubtitle: A production-ready Next.js template with App Router, Chakra UI v3, TypeScript strict mode, and everything you need to launch modern web applications.
techSubheading: Built on a battle-tested stack of industry-leading tools and frameworks.
